name: Seller Assistant
description: Generic seller platform runtime with profile discovery, official-doc search, and read-only JavaScript execution.

currency.description: Display currency fallback used when result formatting needs a currency code.

locale.description: Display locale used for formatted tool output.

timeZone.description: Fallback timezone used for display formatting.

defaultProfile.description: Profile to use when a tool call omits profileId.

profiles.description: Configured provider profiles that tools can search and execute against.

id.description: Stable local identifier for the profile.

provider.description: Built-in provider name such as shopify.
